explanations.1: This declares a customUI XML file that defines the ribbon interface for Microsoft Office applications like Word or Excel.
explanations.4: The insertAfterMso attribute positions this custom tab right after the built-in View tab in the ribbon menu.
explanations.9: imageMso references a built-in Microsoft Office icon (in this case a smiley face); you can use these pre-made icons instead of creating your own.
explanations.11: onAction specifies the name of a function that will run when someone clicks this button—you'll need to write that function elsewhere in your code.
explanations.19: onChange specifies the function name that runs whenever the user modifies the text in this edit box.
